---

## Problem

What workflow is painful, confusing, or missing today?

## Proposed Change

Describe the behavior you would like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

List any workarounds or alternative ideas you have tried.

## Additional Context

Add mockups, screenshots, or examples here if they help explain the request. Please use demo data only.
